notes.thinking-style: Dim styling is now native in 2.1.31 - no patch needed
notes.auto-memory: tengu_oboe removed in 2.1.59. Replaced by feature-flag-toggles patch.
notes.feature-flag-toggles: Enables: edit_minimalanchor_jrn. Retired: session_memory removed in 2.1.133, maple_forge_w8k in 2.1.97, sm_compact gate in 2.1.92, defer_all_bn4 in 2.1.89.
notes.prompt-slim: Updated to 2.1.59 with local-first patch resolution and built-in diagnostics
notes.tool-defer-whitelist: CLAUDE_CODE_IMMEDIATE_TOOLS env var whitelists tools past the deferral gate (including MCP tools)
notes.keyword-highlights: Extended with inline code spans, markdown formatting (**bold**, *italic*, ~~strikethrough~~), and effect-only render path
notes.code-blocks: Renders fenced code blocks in user messages with hljs syntax highlighting via the f9 ANSI component
notes.disable-claude-api-skill: Nops the claude-api skill registration — removes SDK docs injection and proactive triggering on anthropic imports
notes.resume-cache-fix: RETIRED in 2.1.90 — Anthropic fixed natively (also added agent_listing_delta + companion_intro to allow-list)
notes.buddy-salt: RETIRED in 2.1.97 — companion system rewritten with crypto-based name generator, hardcoded salt removed.
notes.thinking-display-summarized: Opus 4.7 omits thinking text by default; this injects display:"summarized" in the request builder so reasoning comes back populated. No-op on 4.6 (already defaults to summarized).
notes.thinking-no-fold: 2.1.153 added a transcript grouper (XP4) that folds thinking blocks into adjacent tool groups, rendering them as a 'Thought for Ns' pill with ctrl+o-to-expand. This patch makes the helper flush the current group and push thinking as its own message so the inline thinking-visibility patch path renders the full reasoning.
